data.title: USELESS Coin Proves Useful—Jumps 52% After Binance Listing
data.description:
According to reports, USELESS coin surged 52% in a single day after becoming the first memecoin from LetsBONKfun to land on Binance. Related Reading: Dogecoin Draws New Attention As Open Interest Tops $3 Billion The price climbed from $0. 19 to $0. 33 during the initial burst, data from Coingecko shows, and many traders sold into that move overnight
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/useless-coin-proves-useful-jumps-52-after-binance-listing/

data.title: Criminals Brag After Using Fake Money To Buy $163,000 Worth of Rolex Watches, Gold Chains and Bracelets: Report
data.description:
A man from Tennessee is reportedly facing charges for allegedly using counterfeit money to buy $160,000 of jewelry from a shop in Boston. Devin Johnson, 20, is facing one count of larceny over $1,200 after allegedly bragging with his partner in crime over the six-figure jewelry theft on social media, reports Boston. com
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/15/criminals-brag-after-using-fake-money-to-buy-163000-worth-of-rolex-watches-gold-chains-and-bracelets-report/

data.title: Trump and Putin wrap three-hour private meeting with absolutely no breakthroughs
data.description:
Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin ended their three-hour private summit in Alaska on Friday night without reaching any deal to stop the war in Ukraine, or the sanctions heading Russia’s way. The meeting, held at an Air Force base in Anchorage, was the first time both men met since 2019, but despite the buildup and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-putin-absolutely-no-breakthroughs/

data.title: Stocks mixed as S&P 500 eases from record, Dow lifted by UnitedHealth
data.description:
The S&P 500 pulled back on Friday after brushing a new record, with investors cashing out gains from a strong week. The index fell 0. 29% to close at 6,449. 80, while the Nasdaq Composite dropped 0. 40%, ending the session at 21,622. 98. The Dow Jones Industrial Average was the only one in green, closing at 44,946. 12 after […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/stocks-mixed-as-sp-500-eases-from-record/

data.title: Hedge fund Brevan Howard becomes the largest IBIT holder with $2.3 billion worth of shares
data.description:
Brevan Howard has become the biggest shareholder of the BlackRock spot Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF). According to a recent Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filing, the hedge fund now owns around 37. 5 million shares of IBIT. This is worth around $2. 3 billion and represents a sizable increase since Q1, when the firm had only 21. 56 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hedge-fund-brevan-howard-becomes-the-largest-ibit-holder-with-2-3-billion-worth-of-shares/

data.title: $48,930,711 in Crypto Assets Looted in Massive Exchange Hack As Stolen Haul Converted to Ethereum: On-Chain Data
data.description:
New data from the cybersecurity firm PeckShield reveals that tens of millions of dollars worth of digital assets were stolen from the crypto exchange BtcTurk. In a new post on X, PeckShield says that the Turkish crypto exchange platform BtcTurk has been exploited to the tune of $49 million worth of crypto assets, $38.
